📡 Live Data Feeds
Create New Event
On Relay Mode Setting
DLC relays will cycle at the selected duty cycle. BAS relays stay ON at the selected priority level. Two LC commands are sent sequentially.
▶ Advanced — relay, mode, strategy override
—
Sends a charge rate limit command to the selected EV charger or all EV chargers in a group via their configured integration.
Min backup reserve configured per asset is always maintained during discharge events.
Generator DR = start/stop. When started, the site can shed utility load or island.
Sends an OpenADR 2.0b event to the configured VEN. Device dispatch follows the signal level → LC strategy mapping in OpenADR Config.

Bubble-Up Interval Control
Configured Interval
Set via Notehub API
Loading...
Actual Interval
Measured from last 2 bubble-ups
Loading...
⚠️ Changes take effect on the device's next inbound sync — which occurs every time a bubble-up is sent. Frequent bubble-ups increase data costs.
Program Mode
🟢 Event Mode
Sets both inbound & outbound to 5 minutes — ensures LC commands are received quickly and device status is monitored closely during active DR events.
⚙️ Normal Mode
Reverts inbound & outbound to your scheduled intervals — applies the current bubble-up schedule rule based on season and time of day.
Quick Presets
Per-Device Control
Device Current Interval Set Interval (mins)
Set All Devices:
Bubble-Up Schedule
Define reporting intervals by season and time of day. Rules are evaluated in order — first match wins. The scheduler runs in the browser and applies settings when the dashboard is open.
Season Definitions
☀️ Summer DR Season
❄️ Winter DR Season

Display Preferences

New Trigger Rule
🔔 Alert
Notify operator. No automatic action.
💡 Suggest
Pre-fill an event for operator to confirm.
⚡ Autopilot
Fire event automatically with grace period.
⚠️ Autopilot will automatically send commands to devices without operator confirmation. Restricted to Administrator role. Ensure hard guards (max events/day, rest period, blackout hours) are configured before enabling.

🏢 BAS Mode

📡 OpenADR
On Relay Mode Setting

All enrolled EV chargers will receive a DR dispatch when this rule fires.

Connected battery backup systems will receive a dispatch when this rule fires.

Connected generators will receive a start command when this rule fires.

An OpenADR event will be sent to all enrolled VENs when this rule fires.

Leave blank for no blackout window
Email users with Alerts enabled in User Management when this rule triggers.

⚡ Utility Outage Tracker
Monitors utility outage counts via DOE/ODIN data. Outage counts are recorded every 15 minutes for correlation with device health and system reports.
Add Utility
If no outage map URL is available the utility will still be tracked — the map link will show "Not available" and may be added later.
No utilities configured. Click + Add Utility to begin.
🌎 ODIN County Outage Data DOE / Oak Ridge National Lab
Real-time county-level outage counts from the DOE Outage Data Initiative Nationwide (ODIN). Updated every 15 minutes and recorded for correlation analysis.
Configure a utility above to load ODIN county data.
📊 Outage Correlation
Grid outage counts vs device offline events — identify when your devices went offline during grid outages.

›
No SCADA data sources configured. Add a source below to begin receiving telemetry.
🔔 Active Alarms

🏠 Service Territory
Define Territory Hierarchy
No territories defined.
📡 SCADA Data Sources
Configure Data Source
REST / JSON
Worker polls HTTPS endpoint on schedule
Webhook / POST
Source POSTs to /scada/ingest on Worker
MQTT / WebSocket
Subscribe to MQTT broker over WSS
OPC-UA REST
OPC-UA via REST wrapper / proxy
CSV / File Upload
Manual historical data import
DNP3 Gateway
Via REST-to-DNP3 gateway service
Modbus Gateway
Via REST-to-Modbus gateway service
IEC 61850
Via MMS/GOOSE REST gateway
Webhook Endpoint
POST https://your-worker.workers.dev/scada/ingest
Configure your SCADA system or gateway to POST JSON telemetry payloads to this URL. See payload format below.
Required payload format:
{"source":"source-name","timestamp":"2026-01-01T00:00:00Z","points":[
  {"id":"point-id","name":"Voltage A-N","type":"analog","value":7620.4,"unit":"V","quality":"good"},
  {"id":"breaker-1","name":"Breaker 1","type":"status","value":1,"unit":"","quality":"good"}
]}
Upload a CSV file with SCADA historical data. Required columns: timestamp, point_id, point_name, type, value, unit
⚠️ DNP3 requires a REST-to-DNP3 gateway running on your network (e.g. OpenDNP3, Triangle MicroWorks, Kepware). Configure the gateway to expose a REST API, then use the REST / JSON source type above pointing to the gateway URL.
⚠️ Modbus TCP/RTU requires a REST-to-Modbus gateway (e.g. Node-RED, ScadaBR, Kepware). Configure the gateway to expose REST endpoints, then use REST / JSON source type above.
⚠️ IEC 61850 (MMS/GOOSE) requires a gateway with REST API (e.g. IEC 61850 SDK, libIEC61850 with REST wrapper). Configure the gateway then use REST / JSON source type above pointing to the gateway URL.
No data sources configured.

📡 Live Device Monitoring
Real-time data pulled from each charger's API feed. Updates every 30 seconds.
Loading live data…
🔌 Enrolled Chargers
Enroll Charging Station
DR Shed Limits
Amps limit sent via SetChargingProfile during DR events. 0A = suspend charging entirely.
No chargers enrolled. Click + Enroll Charger to add a charging station.
⚡ Demand Response Control
Send load shed commands to all DR-enrolled chargers via OCPP SetChargingProfile or relay fallback.
OCPP chargers receive SetChargingProfile with the configured amp limit. Relay fallback chargers receive a relay command from your Notecard devices. OpenADR signals automatically trigger the corresponding shed level.
